lemon_market_new_listings.description: Looking for a reliable vehicle that gets the job done without breaking the bank? This car is a fantastic choice for anyone who prioritizes function and value! While it shows its character through some visible cosmetic wear and signs of regular use, it remains a dependable driver ready for many more miles. It’s an honest car at an honest price!
This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound and has been regularly maintained. The interior and exterior show minor signs of normal wear, but there are no major defects.

This vehicle is in mint, showroom condition and has been meticulously cared for, appearing exactly as it did when first sold. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches, chips, or imperfections, and the interior is pristine with no signs of wear or use. Mechanically, it is perfect; the engine runs silently and powerfully, the transmission shifts with factory-level precision, and every electronic feature works flawlessly. It has a full, documented service history and has been stored in a climate-controlled garage. Buyers can expect a vehicle that is indistinguishable from new in both its aesthetic presentation and mechanical performance.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has minor scratches and visible surface wear. The interior shows moderate use with noticeable wear on the seats. All mechanical systems are functioning correctly.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and a light scratch on the passenger door. Inside, the upholstery is clean and free of tears, with only slight wear visible on the driver’s side bolster. Mechanically, it runs smoothly and has a consistent service history. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and all electronics are fully functional. It’s a reliable car that is ready for its next owner.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. Every aspect of this automobile has been evaluated to ensure it meets our authoritative standards for quality and long-term value. A sophisticated choice for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s still got so much life left in it! It’s in solid shape, runs like a charm, and has been really well-loved over the years. It's a super dependable ride that looks great on the road—perfect for your next adventure. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54B32 inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system for optimized torque across the powerband. The drivetrain utilizes a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox paired with an M Variable Differential Lock. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including rear subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS bulletproofing. The
Good condition. Well maintained. Clean interior. Reliable engine. Title in hand.

Experience the perfect balance of performance and reliability with this meticulously maintained vehicle. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish that catches the light beautifully, showing only minor, age-appropriate imperfections that do not detract from its impressive curb appeal. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free, exceptionally clean cabin featuring premium upholstery in great shape and a full suite of fully functional electronics. Mechanically, this car is a dream; it has been serviced regularly at scheduled intervals, providing a smooth, responsive drive and peace of mind for the road ahead. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes feel crisp and confident. This is a dependable, well-cared-for example ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without any necessary repairs.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber transport solution.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, it has been curated to ensure a sophisticated driving experience. With a comprehensive service history and proven reliability, this offering stands as a testament to quality craftsmanship and enduring value.

Hey there! Looking for a ride that’s as reliable as it is fun? This beauty has been my pride and joy and is still in wonderful shape, ready to hit the road with its next owner! It runs like a dream and has been super well-maintained, so you can drive off with total peace of mind. It's got plenty of life left and is just waiting for some new adventures. Come give it a spin—you’re going to love how it feels!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS to deliver a linear power band up to an 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis remains taut with upgraded poly-bushings and a reinforced rear subframe, mitigating common floor pan fatigue. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and a VANOS overhaul, ensuring mechanical integrity. While the exterior shows minor stone chipping consistent with spirited use, the suspension geometry remains true, providing exceptional turn-in and lateral grip. A driver-focused example ready for the twisties.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive condition, perfect for a driver who values both performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is clean and inviting; the upholstery is well-preserved, and all electronic features and climate controls function exactly as they should. Mechanically, this car is sound, having undergone regular servicing with recent oil changes and brake inspections documented. It drives smoothly, shifts crisply, and offers a quiet, comfortable ride. Whether you're commuting daily or taking a weekend trip, this car provides a premium experience without the new-car price tag. Truly a solid, dependable choice for its next owner.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a synthesis of mechanical excellence and aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained throughout its tenure, the automobile exhibits a refined presence and consistent performance standards. We invite you to acquire a vehicle that balances sophisticated engineering with exceptional value, ensuring a superior driving experience for its next proprietor.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this automobile maintains a commendable standard of performance and reliability. It offers a sophisticated driving experience, underpinned by a documented history of consistent maintenance. This represents a premier opportunity to acquire a well-preserved asset at a strategic valuation.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been truly loved? I'm parting with my car, and it’s in wonderful shape! It runs like a dream and is ready for all your upcoming adventures. Honestly, it’s been such a great companion on the road, and I know you’re going to love it just as much as I have. Come take it for a spin!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Interior shows light wear. Mechanicals are sound.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents beautifully, offering a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, showing only the lightest signs of careful use, while the alloy wheels are free of major scuffs. Inside, the cabin remains a pristine environment; the upholstery is supple and clean, the carpets have been protected by floor mats, and every feature—from the premium sound system to the responsive touchscreen—operates exactly as it should. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, backed by a comprehensive service history that confirms its mechanical integrity. With crisp handling, firm braking, and a set of high-quality tires with excellent tread depth, this car provides a refined driving experience that feels as dependable as the day it was first driven. It is a turn-key example ready for its next long-term owner.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and value. It features a robust mechanical profile and a well-preserved aesthetic, reflecting a history of consistent care and responsible ownership. Each component has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it adheres to our exacting standards for safety and reliability. This offering represents a sophisticated choice for the discerning driver who prioritizes mechanical integrity and long-term utility.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen represents an exceptional balance of performance and value, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure continued reliability. With a clean history and well-preserved interior, it stands as a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber automotive investment.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride! It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in really great shape, perfect for someone who wants a solid, dependable car without the 'brand new' price tag. It runs like a dream and has been super well-cared for over the years. I'm honestly a little sad to see it go, but I know you're going to love it as much as I have! Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin!
This 981-series mid-engine specialist features a 2.7L naturally aspirated flat-six engine paired with a 6-speed manual transmission
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior scuffs. Maintenance records available.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between style and everyday reliability. Meticulously maintained, the exterior retains a deep shine with only the minor, expected road wear consistent with a well-loved car. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free, spacious cabin featuring premium materials and a climate control system that keeps you comfortable year-round. Every button and switch functions as intended, and the infotainment system is responsive and intuitive. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a consistent service history and a recent multi-point inspection. Whether you’re commuting or taking a weekend trip, the handling is precise and the ride is exceptionally quiet. This is a dependable, solid vehicle that has been cared for and is ready for its next owner.

This vehicle represents a distinguished choice for the discerning driver seeking a synthesis of performance and enduring value. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating robust mechanical integrity, this model offers a seamless blend of engineering excellence and sophisticated design. Its present condition reflects a history of diligent care, ensuring continued reliability and a commanding presence on the road. We invite you to experience the refined interior and superior handling that define this exceptional automotive offering.
